hypothesis: On GER40 M5, the Frankfurt/London open (07:00-08:30 UTC) builds a short opening range that is frequently probed and rejected; fading the first extension beyond OR high/low with an RSI divergence-lite confirmation (RSI coming back inside 30-70) mean-reverts to the OR midpoint within 24 bars. Index intraday tape has been mean-reverting in 2020-2024.

entry_rules.long: or_trade==1 AND low < or_low - 0.15*ATR(14) AND close > or_low AND rsi9 crosses above 32
entry_rules.short: or_trade==1 AND high > or_high + 0.15*ATR(14) AND close < or_high AND rsi9 crosses below 68

regime_filter.rule: adx(14, H1) < 30 AND atr_percentile(14, 200) between 20 and 85 AND classify != 'strong_trend'
regime_filter.rationale: Fade only in non-trending regimes; skip news-gap trend days.

notes: Direct response to critic: pivot GER40 from donchian-breakout (dead branch) to intraday opening-range fade.
